name: Cloudbeaver
tagline: CloudBeaver is a lightweight web application designed for comprehensive data management.
description:
CloudBeaver is a lightweight web application designed for comprehensive data management.

Docs: https://dbeaver.com/docs/cloudbeaver/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  cloudbeaver:
    image: dbeaver/cloudbeaver:24
    volumes:
      - cloudbeaver-data:/opt/cloudbeaver/workspace
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - wget
        - -q
        - --spider
        - http://127.0.0.1:8978/
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42014:8978
volumes:
  cloudbeaver-data: null
